title: The Creature Awakens
query: Victor Frankenstein creates the Creature and it comes to life.
summary: Victor finally succeeds in creating life. Horrified by his success, he watches the Creature awaken.
choices: Stay and speak to the Creature.

title: William's Murder
summary: Victor learns his younger brother William has been murdered.

title: Meeting on the Glacier
query: Victor meets the Creature in the Alps.
summary: The Creature asks Victor to hear his story.
